journey.name: Navigation Tab Bar
journey.description: Verify the 4-tab navigation bar works correctly, navigating between Dashboard, Log Food sheet, Scan Menu, and History screens. iOS parity: Navigation tests

actions.action: Verify the Dashboard tab is currently selected at the bottom
Verify the History screen is displayed
Verify the Dashboard screen is displayed with "Watch My Calories" title
Verify the "Log Food" bottom sheet appears with options: Scan Food, Choose from Library, Log Manually
Tap outside the sheet or swipe down to dismiss it
Verify the Dashboard is displayed again
Verify the Scan Menu screen or camera prompt appears
